subject: fix(ui): use DaisyUI modal component classes, refine tab transitions
body:
BaseModal rewritten to use DaisyUI's modal system properly:
- Outer wrapper: modal modal-open modal-middle (DaisyUI overlay, centering, entrance animation)
- Inner content: modal-box (theme-aware surface, shadow, border-radius, responsive sizing)
- Previous approach used custom Tailwind overlay + bare div with 'modal' class that
  collided with DaisyUI's hidden-by-default .modal component
- Backdrop color now uses DaisyUI default (oklch 40% black vs custom 60%)
- Surface color now uses base-100 (DaisyUI standard) vs base-200 (arbitrary)
- Border replaced by DaisyUI's box-shadow (standard for modal-box)

ViewSwitcher: transition-all → transition-colors to avoid transitioning z-index,
margins, and layout properties that can interfere with mobile touch responsiveness.

Removed dead 'duplicate-scanner-modal' className (no CSS definition existed).

Tags: ui, modals, daisyui, tabs, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: bug-fixes
Semver: patch
